rationale: Sentry changed front-end URLs from the old format 'sentry.io/organizations/[org-slug]' to the new subdomain format '[org-slug].sentry.io'. The navigation to organization settings still works (with automatic redirects), but the URL pattern in the postcondition changed from the organizations path to a subdomain-based URL. Old tutorials checking for the specific URL pattern would fail even though the navigation succeeds.
